syllogism_text: It is impossible for a mammal to be an eagle. Some of the eagles are birds. There are a few birds which are not mammals.

attempts.code:
% Facts for eagles that are birds
eagle(hawk1).
bird(hawk1).

% No mammal is an eagle
mammal(_) :- fail.

% Some birds are not mammals (eagle is a bird but not a mammal)
valid_syllogism :- bird(X), \+ mammal(X).
